title: Paper Prototyping Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of creating and testing paper prototypes in UI/UX design.
relationships: Define Requirements leads to Sketch Screens
Sketch Screens leads to Create Interactive Elements
Create Interactive Elements leads to Conduct User Test
Conduct User Test leads to Gather Feedback
Gather Feedback loops back to Refine Design
Refine Design loops back to Sketch Screens for iteration
